## Technical Skills

### Frontend
JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, Sass, Three.js / React Three Fiber, Framer Motion

### Backend
Node.js, Express.js, Python, PHP

### Databases & ORMs
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Prisma ORM

### DevOps & Infrastructure
Docker, Linux, Nginx, Vercel, Git, GitHub

### AI & Tooling
Claude, Cursor, OpenAI Codex, Local AI / LLMs, OpenClaw (self-hosted AI agent gateway)

## Current Position

Full Stack Developer at beWirken (February 2025 – present)
- Development and programming for werkbank projects
- IT infrastructure maintenance and security consulting
- AI strategy development and implementation
- Media production consulting for client projects

## Freelance Work

### The Strange Seeds (September 2024 – present)
Dynamic band website built with Next.js 14 and TypeScript. Real-time concert listings, music streaming integration, structured data for SEO.

### Potera Cleaning (June 2024 – present)
Modern website for a German cleaning company. Contact forms, SEO strategies, performance optimization.

## Selected Projects

### chingis.shop
E-commerce platform with Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, NextAuth.js. Server Components first approach. Perfect Lighthouse scores (100).
URL: https://chingis.shop

### 3D Portfolio (this site)
Interactive 3D portfolio with React Three Fiber, bilingual (EN/DE), draggable 3D island environment.
URL: https://chingis.dev

### The Strange Seeds
Band website with Next.js 14, TypeScript, real-time gig listings, Spotify/YouTube integration.
URL: https://thestrangeseeds.com

### Potera Cleaning
Cleaning company website with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, nodemailer contact form.
URL: https://poterareinigung.de
